## R0 PUSH — FINAL ADJUDICATION (run 5): R0 fixed-g WRITTEN at the paper's own fence s>n/2+6=8 (coincidence-jet reading); R1 Lipschitz FAILS AT EVERY s by the plain estimate; flip stays LEDGER-ONLY. Grade UNCHANGED (GENUINELY-OPEN). (10 Opus max agents, 1 StructuredOutput failure covered; both referees GAP-FOUND; adjudicator independently recomputed every number in sympy.)

THE REVERSAL: the prior runs' "R0 needs s>n/2+7=9, re-fence again" is an ARTIFACT — this run's swarm itself uniformly asserted it (A1/A4/B1/B2/B3), and referee-1 caught it as THE internal overclaim (adjudicator confirmed by independent recomputation, crux.py + dstruct.py): they computed the fence for the PURE-SLOT (2,0)/full-C^2 object, but the minimally-coupled (xi=0) point-split operator D forms ONLY the (1,1) CROSS-JET [D W_g](x,x) — every T_munu term distributes one x- with one y-derivative; no pure second-slot derivative exists in the consumer.

R0 (fixed-g sup bound) — WRITTEN at s>8, the paper's existing fence (coincidence-jet reading): d_y-routing chain (sympy-verified): d_y commutes with box_{g,x} (no commutator at single g), so (box_x+m^2)(d_y W) = -(d_y S_g); S_g profile r^2 log r in H^{4-}(x) with coeff box_g v_1 ~ d^6 g in H^{s-6}(x); d_y drops the profile to r log r (H^{3-}); the +1 energy estimate (Kato 1970 Prop 3.4 / Tice Thm 1.2.1 — the estimate HKM 1977 actually CITE, HKM itself is quasilinear existence and proves no linear estimate; provenance verified) gives d_y W in H^{min(s-5,4-)}(x); one d_x gives d_x d_y W in H^{min(s-6,3-)}(x); (1,1)-jet C^0 (Morrey n=4, k>2) iff min(s-6,3-)>2 iff s>8 STRICT. Coincidence value exists and is continuous; joint C^0 by vector-valued continuity (Arendt-Kreuter arXiv:1611.06161). W_* = named finite product at s>8. NO re-fence to n/2+7 (explicitly DO-NOT).

TWO-SLOT VERDICT: survived — via the d_y-routed vector-valued route. The Cauchy-Schwarz/mode-function route DIES on W_g (H_g is a geometric bi-scalar, not an inner product; route-2 vacuous: ||omega^(2)||_C2 = ||H_g||_C2 = +inf, shared 1/sigma pole). The naive iterated H^5(y;H^5(x)) route OVER-DEMANDS the divergent (2,2) jet (sympy: d_x^2 d_y^2 sigma^2 log sigma -> -inf). The correct lemma: joint (1,1)-continuity <=> slot-wise C^1(K_y; C^0(K_x)) + symmetric.

R1 (Lipschitz clause (ii)) — FAILS AT EVERY s with the plain tool (the true residual; CORRECTS the prior ledger claim at the LEMMA-II entry that "R1 reduces to constant-tracking"): D = W_g - W_g' solves the wave equation with commutator source (box_g - box_g')W_g' = (g-g') d_x^2 W_g' + lower — IRREDUCIBLY second-order in x (the two x-derivatives come from box_x, cannot be routed to the spectator slot). The d_y-routed D-source contains the (2,1) jet of W_g': d_x^2 (d_y W_g' in H^{min(s-5,4-)}) -> H^{min(s-7,2-)}(x), profile branch capped at 2- (d_x^2 d_y of r^2 log r ~ r^{-1} log, H^{1-}); the (1,1)-jet of D needs order > 2, i.e. min(s-7, 2-) > 2 — IMPOSSIBLE at every s (2- < 2). R1 has genuine analytic content beyond R0. ## R1 THREE-ROUTE PUSH — FINAL ADJUDICATION (run 6): R1 REDUCED (not written); sole closer = Route 3 (N=2) at raised fence s>n/2+9=11 (METHOD-RELATIVE upper bound, not sharp); Routes 1-2 refuted as standalone closers; FLIP DOES NOT FIRE. (10 Opus max agents; both referees high-confidence; every number reproduced independently in sympy.)

ROUTE 1 (by-parts / divergence-form) — REFUTED as a full dissolution, with a two-layer verdict on run 5:
- Run 5's MECHANISM ("the d_y-routed source needs the pointwise (2,1) INPUT jet of W_g'") WAS an artifact of source-in-H^{k-1} pointwise bookkeeping — the honest energy method never asks for it; by-parts genuinely reduces the spectator demand, and the H^1 energy Lipschitz bound ||D||_{L^inf_t H^1} <= C_E ||g-g'||_{H^s} IS a theorem at s>8 (plus the |a|+|b|<=1 jets).
- But run 5's CONCLUSION SURVIVES, sharpened: the deficit RELOCATES to the OUTPUT (1,1) jet of D — d_y D in H^{3-}(x) => d_x d_y D in H^{2-}(x), Morrey n=4 needs H^{>2}: ONE full Sobolev order short, s-INDEPENDENTLY. THE JET HEIGHT IS A BY-PARTS INVARIANT (sympy, k=0,1,2 all -> 2-): sliding one d_x off the spectator onto the Green operator turns G_g (order -1, gains +1) into d_x G_g (order 0, gains 0) — the +1 saved is exactly spent. C_W NOT exhibitable at s>8 via Route 1. Also: the +1 wave gain is FORCED by the written R0 (any larger gain would retroactively break R0's own fence — kills the optimistic-artifact direction).

ROUTE 2 (conormal / Hart-Smith / Tataru / Bony-Melrose-Ritter) — NOT WRITABLE standalone or as hybrid at s>8: in-print Strichartz theorems output NORMS not jets (Tataru AJM 122 Thm 3 constant (1+||g||_{C^s}) but bounds L^p L^q); conormal-propagation theorems are C^inf-coefficient + qualitative (no tracked constants, no rough-metric family; Sa Barreto-Wang 1809.09253 Thm 2.6/2.7 verified); and THE CONE VERTEX kills the diagonal jet (sympy: the (2,1) profile (1/u)log|u| is not L^1_loc at the vertex; conormal = tangential smoothness, orthogonal to the transverse-2nd-derivative demand; box_g grazes its own cone but the commutator (g-g')d_x^2 is generic non-characteristic). Contributes at most a supporting lemma.

ROUTE 3 (N=2 subtraction) — THE GENUINE POSITIVE PATH, PLAUSIBLE-modulo-single-paper write-up, closes R1 at s>n/2+9=11 (STRICTLY worse than the current fence s>8; a +3 re-fence): v_2 sigma^2 log sigma lifts the residual profile r^2 log r (H^{4-}) -> r^6 log r (H^{8-}), healing the profile cap 2- -> 4-; the bind shifts to the coeff branch box_g v_2 ~ d^8 g in H^{s-8}; d_x d_y D_2 in H^{min(s-9,4-)}, C^0 iff s>11. C_W = c_Morrey * sqrt(Q e^{PT}) * [c_mult W2_* + C_trans + C_data], every factor named-finite-ball-uniform at s>11 with in-print anchors. N=1.5 NOT feasible as a cost-saver (box_g w ~ d^8 g regenerates the identical coefficient => same s>11). CAUGHT OVERCLAIM (six-for-six): "s>11 is the fence" read as sharp-from-below is WRONG — it is a METHOD-RELATIVE UPPER BOUND (honest +1 energy method); a sharper tool could in principle beat it. A1's "s>10" = the transport-leg/single-metric sub-fence (necessary-not-sufficient), not R1.
- CITATION CORRECTION (Decanini-Folacci recursion, verified): v_2 ~ d^6 g in H^{s-6} (comfortable at s>11); box_g v_2 ~ d^8 g — the task heuristic "v_2 ~ d^8 g" conflated the coefficient with its box.

E2b/E2c/E2d and the interacting (N1) of cor:newtonian-limit stay open regardless.

THE VERDICT SPLITS BY CODIMENSION (the structural discovery of the run):
- BULK (a), codim-0: the dual-paired bound |int_K f^{munu} A_{munu}^{ab} [d_x^a d_y^b D]_diag dvol| <= C_W^HB ||f||_{H^s} ||g-g'||_{H^s} IS WRITTEN (theorem given the banked imports HB1 = R0 fixed-g coincidence limit, HB2 = H^1 energy-Lipschitz, HB3 = the (0,1)-difference-jet C^0 corollary). IBP identity (exact product rule, no boundary term — supp f interior, codim-4 diagonal carries no delta-mass), trace bridge (dominated convergence rides the C^0 single-slot (0,1) jet, H^{3-}), constant chain — all step-verified by both referees + adjudicator sympy (bulk (1,1) log-pairing 1/32; (0,1) 1/108; (0,0) 1/256; slack integral finite for all a<2).
- SLICE (b), codim-1 (the consumer lem:E2-energy-lipschitz integrates the 00-jet over Sigma): FAILED AS PACKAGED, REDUCED. A_00^{00} = 1/2 != 0, so T_00 genuinely contains the BOTH-NORMAL mixed jet (the pi^2 canonical-momentum term). The both-tangential part disposes by tangential Stokes IBP (fine); the both-normal part has NO tangential integration variable for the normal x-derivative and the consumer smears over a single time-slice (no t-IBP available) — the H^{2-} dead jet reappears exactly where it cannot be smeared away. Dual pairing vs phi in H^1(Sigma) fails from H^1-energy alone (needs pi_D^2 in L^{6/5}; HB2 gives only L^1; L^1 not in L^{6/5}). Finiteness (R0 x2) gives a CONSTANT bound, not the rate.
- EXACT MISSING INEQUALITY (HB4): ||D||_{L^inf_t H^2(Sigma_t)} <= C_E^{(2)}(g_0) ||g-g'||_{H^s} at s>8 — the H^2-energy-Lipschitz estimate for D, ONE Sobolev order above the banked HB2, applied to the commutator source (g-g') d_x^2 W_{g'}. Given HB4: pi_D in H^1(Sigma_3) -> L^6 => pi_D^2 in L^3 subset L^2(Sigma), closing (b) a fortiori. PLAUSIBLE at s>8 by the derivative budget (source traces to H^{3/4}(Sigma), no re-fence) BUT it is the irreducible commutator estimate flagged since run 5 — must be WRITTEN, not assumed.

THE NINTH OVERCLAIM (9-for-9, optimistic, internal contradiction): the assembly packaged slice (b) as "THEOREM modulo (HB1-HB3)" while its own rem:HB-L2-gap declared the very inequality (b) needs to "cost no consumer." Root cause: Step 4 CONFLATED the LINEAR normal derivative d_0 D (an honest H^1 quantity, L^2(Sigma)) with the QUADRATIC coincidence pi_D^2 (needs pi_D in L^4(Sigma_3) = H^{3/4}, i.e. ~H^{7/4}-energy). SECONDARY (Referee-2 F1, drafting not math): the staged flip-package restatement pastes the BARE jet contracted with f^{munu} — index-incoherent AND silently drops the operator trace term (-1/2 g_{munu} g^{ab}[...], half of A_00^{00}). Must state the A-contracted scalar J^{Dg} verbatim. The HB-lemma's own eq:HB-J is correct; the defect is only in the pasted hypothesis text. (F2 majorant challenge partially wrong — the (0,1) difference jet IS C^0; only the "cleared/elementary" B20 wording overstated.)

FINITENESS REFRAMING (H2): CORRECT and verified — R0-per-metric gives L^2 finiteness immediately (no codim-4 subtlety; R0 already restricted the fixed-g jet to the diagonal continuously); the RATE is the only new content. The rate mechanism survives for BULK, is structurally unavailable for SLICE (the normal direction has no integration variable) — the codim-dependence is the honest shape of the problem.

RUNG-3 REFUTATION (#14, optimistic, 14-for-14; adjudicator-confirmed by an INDEPENDENT numeric): nb_energy_estimate.tex closed the historic d_y-booking gap ((c,p)->(c,p-1) on transport-averaged coefficients, used silently since run 5) with an oscillatory-average rung whose phase bound |d_t(Lam e.gamma)| >= c Lam d(x,y) is FALSE: d_t(phase) = Lam e.gamma', which VANISHES identically for LP frequency directions e orthogonal to the geodesic chord — "no turning points" bounds |gamma'|, not e.gamma'. SHARP CORRECTED RULE: d_y : (c,p) -> (c+1/2, p-1). Verified three ways: referee 2D-FFT (4 octaves, slopes sigma+1/2-a = -2.49/-1.49/-0.49 vs claimed -3/-2/-1; slab-localized; weight-robust; quadrature 1e-13; re-run by adjudicator) + adjudicator's independent 1D-transverse quadrature (pointwise slope -2.00 = 1-a exact; L^2 -> -2.50 = 1/2-a) + the analytic layer count (amplitude Lam^{1-a} x thickness^{1/2}). W1's 30/30 re-runs PASS but V4a tests only the 1D-ALIGNED phase (in 1D, e.(x-y) = +-|x-y| — the flaw needs >= 2 dims); the internal-consistency defense ("naive count would break referee-confirmed R0") is CIRCULAR: run-5's crux.py (re-read) booked d_y via the profile only and NEVER formed the T2 coefficient term (d_y box v_1)Pi — the banked layer carried the same silent half-order.

The stationary-point geometry is CHART-INVARIANT: normal coordinates cannot transfer the flat phase bound — straightening the geodesics curves the wavefronts. THE BOOKING SURVIVES: the L^2(theta-fan) mass of |C| decays with slope -0.496 in both curved cases (theoretical -1/2; curvature cancels — fat-layer width kappa|v| times stationary amplitude (Lam kappa)^{-1} = thin-layer 1/Lam times O(1), log absorbed by strict caps), so d_y: (c,p) -> (c+1/2,p-1) as a BOOKING/MAPPING-level statement is numerically exact and the repair target is well-posed. GATE VERDICTS: BOTH gates GAP-FOUND (high confidence), converging + adjudicator-reproduced. Route A (Z_0): decisive THEOREM-grade NEGATIVE-RESULT — ADJUDICATOR RE-RAN gate_ripple_refute.py: ripple g=g0+a sin(N z1)(dz2)^2, a=(1/2)eps0 N^{-s}, sign-changes(phi'')=2,3,6,12,24,49,98,196 for N=20..2560, slope(log Z/log N)=1.008 (linear), Z/N->rho/pi=0.0955, a*N^s PINNED at 0.25<eps0=0.5 for ALL N (g in U), sup|phi''|/(K_Gamma rho^2)=O(1) throughout — S1b caps phi''s AMPLITUDE never its oscillation COUNT (=freq N), so sup_{g in U} Z=+infinity, no Z_0 ball-uniform. Route B (c_sub): ADJUDICATOR RE-RAN gate_s3c_decision.py (sympy) — feeding the PROVED mu^{1/2} form into the S3a ledger, the deepest vdC-II shell (m~4D^2/(Lam K)), the bad set (mu_*=(Lam rho)^{-1}), AND the fold route-S tail ALL have ratio-to-target Lam-exponent = +1/2 => OVERSHOOT the Lam^{-1}rho^{-1} target by sqrt(Lam); gate_s3c_thirdroute.py — the most-favorable honest re-pricing (vdC-II where it beats the cap, trivial cap on deep cells where vdC-II amp^2/cap^2=1024/(kbar_2 rho)>1) STILL gives Region B Lam-exp=+1/2. The LINEAR form dtheta(S_mu)<=c_sub mu closes every cell (all Lam-exp=0, kbar_2 cancels to power 0) and IS the truth numerically (gate_sublevel_scaling.py, adjudicator re-ran: dtheta(S_mu)/mu plateaus 0.60-0.65 on flat + the EXACT-13b-double-zero fold chart as mu->0, while dtheta(S_mu)/mu^{1/2} GROWS 0.04->0.29 confirming mu^{1/2} is a loose over-ceiling), but is only PLAUSIBLE (its ball-uniform proof needs the fold-branch count N_0 = the identical Z_0 content Route A refuted; finite C^k regularity cannot supply it). Hence (D3)=PLAUSIBLE => (D1)/(D4)/(D5)/T1'-Main=PLAUSIBLE; the assembler PICKED THE CORRECT ROUTE (B stitched as device, A banked as negative). (b) beta=1/2 GENUINELY PROVED (adjudicator re-ran gate_beta2.py): affine-Plancherel identity beta=(order of vanishing of F=J*w at t=1)+1/2 reproduces 0.497/1.497/2.497/3.497 for orders 0/1/2/3 EXACTLY, J(1)=1 exact algebraic identity (d/dy[gamma_{x,y}(1)]=d/dy[y]=Id => J(1)=|e^T|=1), w(1)!=0 class-permitted (only w(0)=0 imposed), bend-insensitive (q(1)=0 fixes F(1)); S4a introduces NO second independent downgrade. (c) F2/c_fan bent-chart-robust ON-SCOPE (rho<=rho_0): exhibited c_fan=c_dens c_n c_ch valid where c_ch/||dV^{-1}|| are theorems; the off-scope 288-config c_emp=2.366 (rho=1.0>>rho_0, effective c_ch~2.7) honestly labeled a larger-region robustness datum in rem:S1c-gate, NOT a counterexample, "not silently promoted" — no #17-home-(c) promotion. THE ACTUAL #17 (gate 2, mandate point (5) = the #16 site, verbatim the run-13b I-7 miss): S5 gate (c) in t1p_calibrate.py (line 286: wt = np.arange(n+1)/n = w(t)=t) is the y-fan (D1)-witness where integrate_fan bases the geodesic at the origin y=0 (line 62-63: z(0)=0, so t=0 <-> y-end, t=tmax <-> x-end), so w(t)=t vanishes at the WRONG (y) end => in CONTRACT time w~(s)=1-s, w~(0)=1 != 0 => OUT of the contract class W(b) (which requires the weight to vanish at the x-end, gamma(0)=x per Sec.0). The load-bearing PLAUSIBLE verdict and the naive (c+1,p-1) fallback are UNCHANGED. THE DECISIVE COMPUTATION (adjudicator re-derived from primitives in adj13e_independent_race.py; reproduces gate_s3c_decision.py bit-for-bit). Two failing cells share ONE cut mu_* = Lam^{-a} rho^{-c}, priced with the PROVED sqrt branch d_theta(S_mu) <= C_sub*rho*mu^{1/2} (the rho-factor ALREADY in the measure — this IS what the banked gate feeds, l.52/65/72):

PER-CELL x PER-BRANCH EXPONENT TABLE OF RECORD (ratio = cell-mass / T; [Lam-exp, rho-exp, kbar2-exp]; sympy-exact + numeric, adjudicator-reproduced):

    MINIMAX min_a max(A,B) = 1/2 at a=1 (= S3a's OWN mu_*=(Lam rho)^{-1}); both cells then [+1/2, .. , ..]. Numeric regression slopes +0.5000 / +0.5000.
  At the minimax cut a=c=1 (exponents of record, BARE reading):
    (A) deep shell : [Lam^{+1/2}, rho^{+1/2}, kbar2^{-1}]   OVERSHOOT
    (B) bad set    : [Lam^{+1/2}, rho^{+3/2}, kbar2^{0}]    OVERSHOOT  <== canonical failing cell (kbar2^0, off the rho^{-1} column by rho^{+5/2})
    (fold route-S tail) : [Lam^{+1/2}, .., kbar2^{-1/2}]  OVERSHOOT (subdominant — Airy width Lam^{-2/3}; not the binding cell)

    (A) shell : [a/2, c/2, 0];  (B) bad : [1-a/2, 2-c/2, +1].  CONSERVATION identical (sum=1, cut-indep); only the kbar2-column moves (0 bare -> +1 cone), NEVER the Lam^{1/2}.
  LINEAR (PLAUSIBLE-only) closer c_sub^* (kbar2 rho) mu — the UNIQUE form that closes:

THE THREE LEVERS ALL FAIL FOR ONE REASON (conservation), each independently PINNED:
  (1) shell-cut re-optimization mu_*: conservation forbids joint closure (sum=1, minimax +1/2).
  (2) branch-split (mu vs rho*mu^{1/2}): the mu-branch lands the bad set [Lam^0, rho^0, ..] BUT is INADMISSIBLE there — mu_*<rho^2 => the max() returns the SQRT value, and the mu-branch value there IS the linear form = PLAUSIBLE.
  (3) two-scale split: the sqrt-branch layer-cake integrand ~ m^{-3/2} is LOWER-LIMIT dominated (int_{mu_1}^1 m^{-3/2}dm ~ mu_1^{-1/2}); any split scale mu_1 drops out of the optimum — no gain. (Linear integrand m^{-1} -> log, bounded by O(1) cell count -> Lam^0; the gap IS the missing half-power of m.)
  CAP-VALIDITY FENCE (pins the cut, disjoint windows): cap-valid needs mu_* <= (Lam rho)^{-1}; vdC-II-on-bad needs mu_* >= 2^11/(Lam K)=2^11 Lam^{-1} kbar2^{-1} rho^{-2}; window ratio = 2^11/(kbar2 rho) = 40960 (Lam-INDEPENDENT, verified 3 decades; kbar2 rho <= kappa_b = O(1)). DISJOINT => the bad set is cap-ONLY (vdC-II there has amp^2/cap^2 = 2^10/(kbar2 rho) > 1) => a=1 forced. ORIGIN of the deficit: shell amp^2~1/(Lam m) needs measure ~ m^{+1} to cancel; sqrt supplies m^{+1/2}; the missing HALF-POWER of m, at the pinned deep scale mu_*~Lam^{-1}, IS exactly Lam^{+1/2}. No branch/cut/split manufactures a half-power of m. THE NEGATIVE IS THEOREM-GRADE FOR THE NAMED-LEVER CLASS (shell cut a,c free; cell boundaries; branch assignment; two-scale splits — the full parameter space the task named). The only escape would be a NEW THEOREM-grade sublevel measure strictly between rho*mu^{1/2} and the linear c_sub*mu; none exists — the linear form is the unique closer and it is PLAUSIBLE.

## RUN 14 — NEW DEVICE CLASS SCOUT — FINAL ADJUDICATION: SIX ANGLES ALL DEAD; NO PROOF TARGET WORTH A RUN; THE TERMINUS STANDS (run 14, 2026-07-10, Opus scout: six generators A1-A6 + two hostile gates + this adjudicator who RE-DERIVED the conservation law from scratch and RE-RAN every decisive numeric himself — not importing the generators' expressions — ran his OWN two adversarial probes, hunted #19, and ls-verified the staged corpus). SCOPE: this run answers 13e AUTHOR'S OPTION (2) — "open a new device class outside the count-free/linear dichotomy" — by scouting six candidate device classes. RESULT: **all six reduce to the certified-dead ball-uniform fold-branch count N_0; NONE is worth a proof run; the naive (c+1,p-1) PERMANENT TERMINUS (run 13e) STANDS UNCHANGED.** This is a full-value outcome (a genuine none-verdict, not a manufactured target); the naive-row close-out remains the only path to the flip. BOTH gates CONFIRMED (high confidence), adjudicator-reproduced.

THE UNIFYING TEST (adjudicator re-derived FROM SCRATCH, hostile_conservation.py, independent of gate_s3c_decision.py; reproduced bit-for-bit). For ANY count-free sublevel measure P(mu)=rho^alpha mu^beta feeding the two failing cells (deep vdC-II shell amp^2=2^9 D^2 b^2/(Lam mu_* K) + bad-set cap cap^2=(b/2)^2, shared free cut mu_*=Lam^{-a}rho^{-c}): Lam-exp(A)=a(1-beta), Lam-exp(B)=1-a*beta; d/da[SUM]=1-2beta so the sum is cut-INDEPENDENT (=1) ONLY at beta=1/2 (the proved branch); the MINIMAX over the cut = 1-beta (beta=1/2->+1/2 FAILS, beta=3/4->+1/4, beta=1->0 CLOSES). **So EVERY new-device angle must, after unfolding, supply a count-free sublevel measure with beta>=1 (equivalently a ball-uniform N_0); nothing weaker closes the deep cell.** TWO independent facts foreclose this, both adjudicator-reproduced on his OWN families: (i) beta=1/2 is the count-free CEILING AND a STRUCTURAL MAXIMUM over fold order — MY adj_higherfold.py: a single A_k critical point gives sublevel exponent beta=1/k <= 1/2 (k=2:0.500, k=3:0.321, k=4:0.226, k=6:0.133), so a DEGENERATE higher-order critical point makes beta SMALLER not larger; the simple A_2 fold is the true max. (ii) N_0 is UNBOUNDED over U — MY re-run gate_ripple_refute.py (ripple g=diag(1,1+a sin(N z1)), a=(1/2)eps0 N^{-11}: Z=2,3,6,12,24,49,98,196 for N=20..2560, slope 1.008, a*N^s PINNED 0.25<eps0 in-ball) AND MY hostile_worstcase_beta.py O(1)-bend A=0.45 (Z=2,4,8,15,31,61 slope +0.984; honest sublevel measure beta~1.01 BOUNDED but the count-free provable ceiling = per-piece vdC x (1+Z) ~ N blows up). The GAP between the bounded honest measure (beta=1, F3) and the provable count-free ceiling (beta=1/2, F1) IS N_0 (F2), refuted at THEOREM grade on multiple in-ball families.

THE MAP — per-angle verdicts, all GENUINE NEGATIVE (the killing fact; adjudicator re-ran the decisive numeric for each):
  A1 (frequency-direction e-average) — DEAD, two logically-independent kills. (MY t1p_dev_A2_hessfloor.py) the only genuinely-new mechanism (2D-x stationary phase) re-needs a ball-uniform x-Hessian LOWER floor = a phi''''-type LOWER bound, but R3 gives only phi''' UPPER bounds and the H^s ball FORBIDS a floor by a hard dichotomy (in-ball => amp*N^2->0; a floor => amp*N^s->inf, out of ball — DISJOINT windows for large N).
  A3 (Seeger-Sogge-Stein angular caps) — DEAD, two kills, reduces to the caustic-cap count = N_0. ## RUN 15 — THE REAL-ANALYTICITY PROGRAM — FINAL ADJUDICATION: N_0 IS A THEOREM OVER U_omega; THE CASCADE IS THEOREM ON THE FOLD STRATUM N_{m0} ONLY (PLAUSIBLE end-to-end over U_omega — W2 over-consumes N_0 on V_{m0}\{≡0}); CONSUMERS ALL ANALYTIC-SAFE; THE FLIP IS ONE FINITE DOWNSTREAM CHECK AWAY (run 15, 2026-07-10, Opus swarm: 4 writers W1-N0/W2-cascade/W3-consumers/W4-S1transfer + 2 hostile gates + this adjudicator who re-ran the crossing/strip-sup/D3/Vm0-binding/final-audit gates himself, re-derived the W2-vs-W1 scope mismatch, verified the App.E2 structural finding + the 22-token count against unification.tex verbatim, and hunted #20 across the seams). SCOPE: this run executes 13e/14 AUTHOR'S OPTION (2) — "a FRESH regularity theorem exporting the ball-uniform fold count N_0 that no (R)-item supplies" — via real-analyticity. RESULT: **the object N_0 IS recovered over an analytic ball U_omega at THEOREM grade (the terminus's named obstruction is DISCHARGED on the fold stratum); the end-to-end cascade over U_omega is PLAUSIBLE, gapped at exactly one downstream weigh-in (the near-flat V_{m0} sliver at the binding cut), which all numerics support but no writer proves; the consumer side is fully ANALYTIC-SAFE (no dense-vs-open false discharge).** This is a genuine ADVANCE over the run-13e/14 terminus (which was PLAUSIBLE with the count REFUTED at finite C^k); it is NOT yet a flip. BOTH gates CONFIRMED (high confidence), adjudicator-reproduced.

THE FRAMEWORK (Def an-Uomega, W1). U_omega(g_0,rho_a,eps_a) = {g holomorphic on the complex collar K_{rho_a} of K'', ||g-g_0||_{collar-sup} < eps_a}, g_0 real-analytic. EMBEDDING (Lem an-embed): ||g-g_0||_{H^s} <= C_emb ||g-g_0||_{collar}, C_emb = C_cw(1+rho_a^{-s})|K''|^{1/2} by Cauchy estimates; so eps_a <= eps_0/C_emb gives U_omega SUBSET U and ALL S1a/S1b/S1c/S2 exports (R1-R5, F2, S2-0, D2) transfer verbatim with U-constants. Pinned by exactly three data (rho_a,eps_a,g_0); NO Sobolev index, NO C^k norm enters N_0 — the whole gain over U.

N_0 VERDICT: **THEOREM over U_omega** (Lem an-N0 / Lem N0-analytic, W1). N_0(rho_a,eps_a,g_0) = ceil(4/r_t)(1 + log(R_0)/log(3/sqrt2)), r_t = min(1/4, rho_a/(16 M_Gamma c_ch rho_0)), R_0 = M_phi''/m_0. Proof = tile [0,1] into ceil(4/r_t) tiles of length r_t/4, per-tile Jensen centred at the strip-sup point (value >= m_0 by the PER-TILE floor), outer disc R=3r_t/4 (in-strip), inner r=sqrt2 r_t/4 (covers tile's real zeros), ratio 3/sqrt2. The strip-sup bound M_phi''=4 M_Gamma c_ch^2 rho^2 is taken DIRECTLY from phi''=-e.Gamma(gamma')(gamma') (the rho-HONEST O(rho^2) bound, NOT the lossy O(1) Cauchy bound), so the Jensen ratio R_0 is rho-BOUNDED (~ rho_0^2/rho_min^2 <= 9), not blowing up as rho->0.
  THE GATE'S OSCILLATION-WITHIN-ANALYTICITY ATTACK FIRES ON THE RAW COUNT — AND W1 SURVIVES IT HONESTLY (adjudicator reproduced gate_crossing.py + gate_strip_sup.py). Driving the ball-EDGE ripple g=diag(1,1+a sin(K z1)), a->0 at mode K=arccosh(eps_a/a)/rho_a (collar-norm pinned = eps_a, IN U_omega), the GENUINE analytic zero count of phi'' on [0,1] is Z ~ K rho/pi = log(eps_a/a)*(rho/rho_a)/pi -> +infinity (Z=1,3,6,10,14,21,...,113 as a:1e-2->1e-160; amplitude-INDEPENDENT, confirmed by a high-precision linearized count immune to float underflow — Z grows LINEARLY in K, these are real zeros of the analytic phi'', not noise). Meanwhile the writers' N_0 FORMULA saturates to its floor ceil(4/r_t)=16 as a->0 (because M_Gamma ~ 0.5 eps_a K e^{-K rho_a/2} -> 0, so r_t -> 1/4 and R_0 < 1 kills the log term). So the RAW fold count over U_omega is UNBOUNDED and DOES scale with log(amplitude ratio) — **N_0's formula degenerates as amplitude->0 (this IS the program's residual ripple; stated plainly).** W1 is NOT refuted because these divergent-Z families have complex-STRIP-sup(phi'') -> 0 (verified: strip_sup = 1.6e-4..6e-16 << m_0 = 5e-4 for a<=1e-4) and LAND IN V_{m0}, exactly the stratum where Lem an-N0's PER-TILE floor is NOT met and the count is DISCLAIMED. The strip-sup NEVER exceeds the writers' uniform bound M_phi''=285.5 (so Prop an-strip is NOT violated by any in-ball metric). The gate's headline "Z=21 > N_0_floor=16" compares Z against the SATURATED formula value on families that are in V_{m0}, where W1 does not count — so it does NOT falsify Lem an-N0. RIPPLE EXCLUSION itself (collar norm = a cosh(K rho_a) -> +inf; first-excluded N_*=252 at rho_a=0.25,eps_a=1) is a clean THEOREM: exp beats poly, the C^k refuter cannot enter the analytic class.

CASCADE STATUS: **THEOREM on the fold stratum N_{m0} (and for mu>=kappa_V everywhere); PLAUSIBLE end-to-end over U_omega — gated at ONE downstream check. W2's prop:an-D3 "THEOREM over U_omega modulo (N0-an)" IS AN OVERCLAIM (gate (c), CONFIRMED); honest grade PLAUSIBLE.** The mismatch, adjudicator-verified line-by-line:
  - W1 cor:an-split (t1p_an_N0.tex l.610-702) is SCRUPULOUSLY HONEST: it splits B_nd = B_N (fibre in N_{m0}) ⊔ B_V (fibre in V_{m0}) and proves the PURE linear form d_theta(S_mu)<=c_sub mu ONLY on B_N and for mu>=kappa_V on B_V, with a count-free mu^{1/2} REMAINDER (C_sub rho mu^{1/2}) for mu<kappa_V on B_V. Lem an-N0 divides by m_0 and is licensed ONLY on N_{m0} = {min_j sup_strip|phi''| >= m_0}, a STRICT subset of B_nd.
  - W2 thm:an-linear (t1p_an_cascade.tex l.223-236) claims d_theta(S_mu)<=c_sub mu for ALL mu>0 at THEOREM grade, and its lem:an-degenerate (l.167-197) splits ONLY B_deg={phi''≡0} vs B_nd={phi''≢0}, then applies (N0-an) on ALL of B_nd (l.243-248). But (N0-an) is NOT valid on all of B_nd — only on N_{m0} ⊊ B_nd. The gap stratum V_{m0}\{≡0} (near-vanishing but nonzero phi'', positive measure — exactly where the low-amplitude ripples live) is INSIDE B_nd but OUTSIDE N_{m0}. W2 NEVER mentions kappa_V, V_{m0}, or the mu^{1/2} remainder (grep-verified: zero occurrences in t1p_an_cascade.tex). So W2 applies the count on a strictly larger set than W1 proved it — a genuine over-consumption.
  - LOAD-BEARING? The binding (D3) cut is mu_* = (Lam rho)^{-1} -> 0 < kappa_V = m_0/(kbar_2 rho^2) = O(1) (at Lam=1e4,rho=0.3: mu_*=3.3e-4 < kappa_V=5.6e-3), so the V_{m0} remainder is nominally ACTIVE at the scale where the terminus deficit lived. Thus prop:an-D3's end-to-end closure is conditional on (N0-an) AND an unproven V_{m0} flat-layer weigh-in that W1 (Rem an-downstream out i) and W2 (gap 1) BOTH FLAG but NEITHER PROVES.
  - NUMERICS STRONGLY SUPPORT the weigh-in closing (adjudicator reproduced gate_Vm0_binding.py, gate_D3_ripple.py, gate_final_audit.py — ALL show the near-flat/ripple stratum closes (D3) at TARGET, not the overshoot): (i) near-flat quadratic + degenerate-A3 model phases in V_{m0} give int|I|^2 dtheta ~ mass*Lam const (slope ~ -1), and mass*sqrtLam DECAYING (better than Lam^{-1/2}); (ii) the actual device integral on the ball-edge ripple family (a=1e-3..1e-10, Z~3..9 folds) closes at mass*Lam const then STEEPER than -1 (mass*Lam 6.77->1.02; mass*sqrtLam 0.39->0.003) — the exp-tiny amplitude makes the folds invisible to |I_Lam|; (iii) a GENUINE O(1) analytic Lorentzian bump at the ball edge (real fold, NOT amplitude-suppressed) closes at mass*Lam~7.1 const (slope -1). So V_{m0} very plausibly closes by the flat-layer route (out i), but that is a FINITE DOWNSTREAM S3a/S3b CHECK, not proved in this run. Banked 13e linear row re-run bit-for-bit (gate_s3c_decision.py): LINEAR measure lands shell [Lam 0,kbar2 0], bad [Lam 0,kbar2 +1 on-target via kbar2 rho<=kappa_b], fold [Lam 0,kbar2 0] — all CLOSE at target Lam^{-1}rho^{-1}; the sqrt/THEOREM row overshoots [Lam +1/2]. CONSUMER VERDICT (W3 audit, #20 home (c)): **ALL ANALYTIC-SAFE; ZERO NEEDS-OPEN; the dense-vs-open false discharge does NOT fire.** Adjudicator verified the load-bearing structural finding VERBATIM against unification.tex: the ONLY use of open-ness of the metric neighbourhood U in the entire App.~E2 is to keep GLOBAL HYPERBOLICITY via Chrusciel-Grant stability under C^0-SMALL perturbations (l.17024-17027) — a C^0-NORM bound, inherited termwise by ANY subset, in particular the interior-free analytic ball. ### AUDIT-TREE SUMMARY (the governing structural fact, adjudicator-confirmed against ISSUES.md l.4480-4614 + the files).
The staged analytic chain does NOT prove Hyp. hyp:hadamard-uniform-omega's clauses (i)/(ii)/(iii). It proves a DIFFERENT object: the analytic slice register over the class U_omega. The clauses are the named INPUTS (E2a-omega) CONSUMED by thm:E2-Lipschitz / prop:N1-free-omega (paper l.17236 ff), not derived by any companion file. This matches the ledger's own THE-FLIP status (l.4608-4612): the paper still carries E2a as a restated (analytic-collar) HYPOTHESIS; the companion chain is referee-confirmed THEOREM end-to-end over U_omega in the research record; PUBLISHING that chain is the remaining step. THIS APPENDIX IS THAT PUBLICATION. Two-part master theorem thm:an17:E2a-omega-main (fragment l.3680-3746): Part (A) UNCONDITIONAL over U_omega (the slice chain, four sub-clauses A1-A4 each citing a THEOREM-grade node); Part (B) the fused free-massive-scalar first law = THEOREM-MODULO {M1,M2,M3} with M1/M2/M3 stated as EXPLICIT named in-hypothesis clauses (l.3720-3733) and the proof block (l.3772-3777) declaring them NOT discharged. Title: "Analytic slice register over U_omega, and the first-law extraction modulo the Hadamard/QEI clauses" — NEVER "E2a-omega is a theorem" (that string appears in the fragment ONLY in comments l.1813/3499 and the correctly-negated master-label sentence l.3889 "is a theorem MODULO the finite ...").

- ONE RESIDUAL DEFECT (referee-1, adjudicator-REPRODUCED verbatim; NON-BLOCKING, fence/grade/scope/modulo-NEUTRAL, but a strict referee should require it fixed before print): an internal CONSTANT-BOOKKEEPING inconsistency in the power of (1+N_0) in the (D3) constant. Two incompatible conventions for the device scalar D coexist in the file: (i) D = c_sub^{1/2} = (c_vel(1+N_0))^{1/2} at eq:an17-Ddef l.1209 / eq:an17-D3 l.1917 / eq:an17-chain l.2192 => D^2 = c_vel(1+N_0), LINEAR in (1+N_0); (ii) the boxed fibre result an17:thm-D3fibre l.1212 and prop:an-D3 l.1726/l.1741 write C_2 D^2 = C_2(1+N_0)^2, QUADRATIC — l.1741 literally sets "C_2 D^2 = C_2(1+N_0)^2", which forces D = 1+N_0, contradicting (i). Compounding: an17:thm-D3fibre l.1224-1226 asserts "the device factor D^2 is carried ONLY by the bad cell; the vdC-II, fold, and endpoint masses are D-free", yet the same theorem's Lemma an17:lem-ledger carries (1+N_0)^2 in the vdC-II line and in c_fold = (1+N_0)^2 eta^{-2/3}. FENCE-NEUTRAL: N_0 is a fixed finite ball-uniform constant over U_omega, so any fixed power of (1+N_0) is ball-uniform; the Lambda^{-1}rho^{-1} scaling that alone sets s>11 via the derivative budget is untouched by the power. It is a localized exposition/tracking slip — NOT a math gap, NOT a grade promotion, NOT a missing import, NOT a scope overclaim. AUTHOR FIX at apply-time: pick ONE convention (either D=1+N_0 throughout with c_sub=(1+N_0)^2, or keep D=c_sub^{1/2}=(c_vel(1+N_0))^{1/2} and correct the boxed fibre/prop:an-D3 constants to C_2 c_vel(1+N_0)), and reconcile the "D-free" prose with the cells that actually carry the factor. Verdict UNAFFECTED.
DEFECT LIST (the exact residual): {D1-power-of-(1+N_0) reconciliation in an17:thm-D3fibre / prop:an-D3 / eq:an17-chain}. Everything else PUBLISHABLE.

## RUN 18 — CRACK (N1), THE INTERACTING SEAM — FINAL ADJUDICATION: (N1) NEITHER PROVED NOR REFUTED; certified FULL-VALUE REDUCTION of (N1) to a single named open problem **B1a** at the **all-orders-formal-pAQFT** ceiling, PLUS a certified nonperturbative OBSTRUCTION (Yang-Mills-or-harder). ### (0) THE SCOPE STATEMENT OF RECORD (the prize, exactly as cor:newtonian-limit consumes it)
(N1) proper = the **pointwise null-null equation of state (star)**:
  delta G_{uv} k^u k^v = (8piG/c^4) delta<T^SM_{uv}>_omega k^u k^v  along EVERY null k through EVERY point of the weak-field region,
first order in delta, Hadamard/finite-relative-entropy state class, INTERACTING massive SM matter (tex l.19424-19428 verbatim; l.19562 "(N1) is exactly the gap ... the uniform pointwise, every-null-direction upgrade of the per-wedge first-law identity").
- What (N1) does NOT contain (already in-paper machinery, OUT of scope): the (star)->tensor inversion (rem:qnec-sat-status steps (i)-(iii): trace-free reconstruction [Jacobson1995] + Bianchi + covariant conservation, matter-agnostic geometry, tex l.18723-18739) and the Lambda VALUE (step (iv), the irreducible seam = the MEASURED input N2, tex l.18740-18757). VERIFIED THIS RUN: the inversion consumes NO QNEC saturation; (N1) is a FIRST-ORDER (n=1) first-law object, "strictly weaker than Hyp qnec-saturation ... whose n=2 saturation content the first-law branch does not consume" (tex l.19442-19446).
- CEILING (certified): thm:clausius-SM is "an application of existing pAQFT theorems plus Bianchi-Myers" (tex l.19649), delivers ONE integrated scalar per wedge (eq:clausius-SM-flux; "The full tensor equation is NOT derived", l.19403). So the maximally-honest (N1) target is **all-orders-formal-pAQFT**; a nonperturbative (N1) OUTRUNS its own premise. This is the non-negotiable upper wall.
- DECOMPOSITION of record (unchanged, ISSUES l.4057): N1 = [per-point n=1 first law] + [E2a uniformity] + [B1 interacting] + [B2-curved rate]. Direction-uniformity PROVEN OUTRIGHT (transverse projector spectrum {0,0,1,1}, sympy re-verified this run in 3 null directions). Point-uniformity = E2a EXACTLY. The two genuinely-open cores are B1 and B2-nonKilling.
- DECOUPLING (verified): (N1) is routed through the scalar-Clausius/linearised-E0 branch, NOT the E2 Hadamard-parametrix chain, so it is INDEPENDENT of the E2a-omega metric-ball regularity class (tex l.19603-19611). Do NOT import analyticity as if it helped (N1).

### (1) THE MAP — six routes graded post-referee (every decisive fact re-derived/re-read this run)

THE MASTER SEAM, adjudicated from PRIMARY SOURCE this run (the pivot of the whole map). DFP arXiv:1710.09747 (= AHP 19 (2018) 3289), read at l.420-434, 148-153, 25-27:
- DFP DEFINE the two-state Araki relative modular operator Delta_{Psi,Phi} := S*S with S A Psi = A* Phi (l.420-427) and state (l.433-434 VERBATIM) it "cannot be directly applied in the context of pAQFT ... because neither the generators of the free or interacting evolutions nor **the corresponding modular or relative modular operators are at disposal in A**." The REASON (l.27, l.61, l.152-153) is that the interacting observables form A(M)[[lambda]], a FORMAL-POWER-SERIES *-algebra, NOT a von Neumann algebra with a GNS space on which S and its polar decomposition exist. This is NOT thermal-specific and applies to ANY two states on the interacting net (incl. excited-vs-vacuum).
- WHAT SURVIVES: the cocycle intertwiner U between free and interacting evolutions (l.434-438), from which DFP build a relative-entropy FUNCTIONAL S(w_b, w_{b,V}) = w_b(bK) + log w_b(U(ib)) (l.157), "positive in the sense of formal power series" (Prop 2.2b, l.497), ORDER BY ORDER. A FUNCTIONAL, not an operator.
- CONSEQUENCE (resolves the paper's own flagged tension, rem:SM-residual(i) l.19655 vs ISSUES l.4060): the ONE-STATE modular structure (crossed product, "modular theory exists for any type-III_1 factor", tex l.19655) SURVIVES; the TWO-STATE relative modular OPERATOR that the first-law identity "dS_rel = d<K> with K modular" needs is the DFP-ABSENT object, FALSE-BY-TYPE at n>=1. Both readings are correct about DIFFERENT objects (one-state vs two-state). The correct binding position is R6's / the ledger's (l.4060), NOT R1's proof.tex headline.

- **ROUTE 1 (wedge-modular / Bisognano-Wichmann transfer) — REDUCES + one SURVIVING obstruction; HEADLINE #24-FLAGGED.** KILLING FACT on the headline: R1's "O2/O3 taxonomy" claim that the two-state Araki operator "EXISTS for interacting theories" (n1_R1_proof.tex l.59) MISREADS DFP (both referees GAP-FOUND high-confidence; adjudicator confirms from DFP l.420-434 directly). DFP's absent object IS R1's "O2"; the survives/fails line is one-state vs two-state, NOT thermal vs boost. So B1a does NOT shrink to the non-Killing-only problem, and "B1b discharged on Killing loci modulo only hsmi-SM" is discharge-modulo-H1 (hsmi-SM in d=4 = the interacting SM wedge being a genuine vN algebra = the existence elephant; R1's own text concedes this at l.137, l.244 while claiming non-circularity at l.264 -- internally inconsistent). WHAT SURVIVES (verified, not over-killed): (a) the RIGIDITY OBSTRUCTION (Thm 1) is INDEPENDENT of the O2 error and CORRECT -- sympy re-run this run: conformal-Killing defect (L_chi g)_00/g_00 - (L_chi g)_22/g_22 = -4t d_xPhi/(4Phi^2-1), nonzero (0.078 at sample), restoring to L_chi eta = 0 in the flat limit; so on generic non-Killing weak-field patches there is NO geometric boost for the wedge-modular flow to equal, and the naive "wedge-modular = boost + corrections" frame is ILL-POSED there; (b) R1's bottom-line VERDICT (NEGATIVE-RESULT; (N1) reduces to a named problem) is correct. REDUCES (N1) TO: B1a (the full define-the-object surrogate problem, whole weak-field region) at formal-pAQFT.

- **ROUTE 2 (pAQFT / perturbative interacting fields as a formal power series) — REDUCES, best forward-mechanism.** No KILLING FACT; the chain does NOT close on Route-2 machinery alone but Route 2 pulled DFP at primary source and delivered the sharpest forward statement: the Clausius chain closes ORDER BY ORDER iff four per-order conditions {C1 surrogate exists on wedge; C2 first variation = boost flux; C3 flat->curved rate uniform non-Killing; C4 C_n(g) finite & ball-uniform} hold. TWO REGISTERS (n1_R2_uniformity.py, both correctly fenced): (R-ball) ball-uniformity holds at ONE ORDER-INDEPENDENT Sobolev threshold s0 (UV singularity = order-independent free Hadamard parametrix; vertices at distinct points), so "uniform-in-the-ball at each order" reduces to interacting-E2a at s0 reused per order, NO new input per order; (R-order) {C_n} is NOT uniformly bounded in n (generic asymptotic series, radius 0) and MUST NOT be claimed to be (= #24 home b; explicitly guarded). HONEST CORRECTION of R2's headline (referee SEAM 2): DFP SOLVES object-existence only for the TIME-TRANSLATION-KMS / thermal / Minkowski case; the boost-flux-first-law clause the scope's B1a includes is R2's own OPEN {H-T1 boost transfer + H-B1b boost-Noether}. R2 downgrades B1a's "undefined" half (the FUNCTIONAL exists as a formal series) but NOT to "solved" -- the boost/curved/SM transfer is the residual. REDUCES (N1) TO: {H-T1, H-B1b, H-B2-nonKilling, H-E2a}, of which only H-B2-nonKilling is a genuinely-open quantitative core.

- **ROUTE 3 (null-cut / half-sided modular inclusion, Ceyhan-Faulkner pattern) — CLOSED (certified obstruction, three independent grounds).** KILLING FACTS: (G1 order/type) (star)/B2 is a FIRST-ORDER (n=1) rate-EQUALITY; CF supply an n=2 QNEC INEQUALITY (CF-C2) and an n=1 ANE equality (CF-C1) orthogonal to the rate (reads ANE off an ALREADY-assumed boost/HSMI structure, does not control the curved finite-cut approach to it = B2). The paper sources the rate to FS/Kudler-Flam, NOT CF (tex l.18714-18716; ISSUES l.4054). (G2 no-go) HSMI supplies only the monotonicity SIGN D>=0, never the equality/rate: prop:crossed-product-saturation-nogo l.18866 VERBATIM "the half-sided modular inclusion supplies the monotonicity SIGN D>=0, not its vanishing (the free null-cut net has the inclusion yet D != 0)". (G3 non-bypass) CF's purifications are "constructed using relative modular flow" = the DFP-absent object; instantiating CF for interacting SM RE-REQUIRES B1a -- the route routes "around B1" through a theorem whose hypotheses re-assume the missing B1a object. SUB-QUESTION ANSWERED: rem:qnec-sat-status's inversion consumes NO saturation (matter-agnostic geometry + measured Lambda), so there is NO saturation-strength demand anywhere in the (N1) chain for CF to meet. SALVAGE: CF/HSMI buys the ANEC/QNEC INEQUALITY (the sign) for the ANEC leg / GSL at proven strength -- load-bearing there, NOT for (star). FENCE: add "B2/(star) via CF-HSMI positivity" to the DO-NOT list.

- **ROUTE 4 (Wall's semiclassical GSL / null quantization) — CLOSED (certified negative, by TYPE).** KILLING FACT from Wall's own primary source (arXiv:1105.3445, extracted wall_1105.3445.txt): Wall's GSL is AXIOMATIC (Determinism + Ultralocality + Local Lorentz + Stability), and he PROVES the axioms ONLY for free/1+1 fields (l.513-515 verbatim: axioms "will be shown ... for FREE FIELDS, but PLAUSIBLY hold even for interacting fields, ASSUMING that a null hypersurface restriction makes sense at all"). His own §5.2 (l.1848-1869): for ANY interacting D>2 field (anomalous dimension eta>0) "a local field will no longer obey the free wave equation ... Such fields DO NOT FORM OPERATORS when smeared on the horizon alone" -- his spectral computation eq.112 is DIVERGENT, "NO OPERATOR CAN BE DEFINED". So the null algebra A(H) does not exist by field restriction for interacting matter. THREE-WAY TYPE MISMATCH: (star) needs a pointwise EQUALITY for interacting-4d SM; Wall delivers a per-slice MONOTONICITY INEQUALITY for free/1+1. All successors (Faulkner-Speranza, Ali-Suneeta, Kirklin) are monotonicity inequalities, KILLING-ONLY, and route around the horizon-algebra triviality. HONESTLY TRANSFERRED in-paper at all 6 Wall2012 sites (Role A = GSL read as Araki-monotonicity SIGN, backed by crossed-product theory, NOT Wall's null construction; Role B = achronal-ANEC held open). Wall is correctly ABSENT from the (star) derivation (grep empty). Supplies NOTHING to B1a or B2-nonKilling.

- **ROUTE 5 (spectral / Kallen-Lehmann + EFT) — REDUCES B2's coefficient; DECISIVE NEGATIVE on C_T-universality.** No KILLING FACT for the route; it does not touch B1a. DELIVERS: (i) FORMULATION -- the per-wedge Clausius RATE B2 controls is a MOMENT of the null-null spin-2 Kallen-Lehmann density, RATE(l) = int dmu^2 rho_2(mu^2) W(mu^2 l^2), with W a universal geometry+2pi-boost kernel (matter-blind) and the spin-0 TRACE density projected out by k^2=0 (spectral face of the antilocality clearance). (ii) FREE-FIELD CHECK PASSES (sympy-exact, re-run this run): spin-2 amplitude a2 = 2m^2/3 - s/6 prop (s-4m^2) VANISHES at threshold -> edge exponent 5/2 (beta^5); trace amplitude a0 = m^2 nonzero -> beta^1. So the null projection (k^2=0 kills the trace/monopole channel) converts the m-LINEAR "diamond disease" ((ml)log(ml)) into the m-QUADRATIC (ml)^2 wedge rate -- a genuinely-new spectral EXPLANATION of why the wedge rate is (ml)^2 not (ml), and an INDEPENDENT cross-validation of the banked position-space rate (power + single-log-count; no O(1) prefactor claimed, two numerical-stability overclaims self-caught and RETRACTED in n1_R5_selfaudit3_HONEST.md). (iii) DECISIVE NEGATIVE (sympy-exact): the massive-massless spin-2 DIFFERENCE density has its s^2 (C_T normalization) coefficient CANCEL EXACTLY -- so the central charge C_T is INERT for the mass-driven rate; C_T-universality / c-theorem lore does NOT transfer to the per-wedge scalar. REDUCES B2's interacting coefficient TO: rho_2^int(mu^2), the interacting SM spin-2 Kallen-Lehmann density over [SM thresholds, 1/l^2] (a sum over channels, NOT one universal number), a formal-pAQFT-computable object at thm:clausius-SM grade. STRUCTURAL BONUS (PLAUSIBLE): the paper's saturation inversion (QNEC saturation FAILS free / HOLDS interacting-with-twist-gap) indicates rho_2^int is twist-gap-controlled, so the interacting B2 rate EXISTS and is controlled though non-universal. NON-CONFLATION: saturation is n=2; the B2 rate is n=1; (N1) consumes only n=1.

- **ROUTE 6 (obstruction / the map's floor) — CERTIFIED.** Two ends, both real. CEILING (certified NEGATIVE): nonperturbative (star) contains delta<T^SM_{uv}>, requiring a genuine vN algebra + affiliated self-adjoint interacting-SM stress tensor in d=4 (H1, nonexistent). REDUCTION (certified, 3-move): restrict the hypothesised nonperturbative SM net to its pure-gauge SU(3) sub-net (Yukawa/hypercharge off) => a nonperturbative 4d SU(3) Yang-Mills stress tensor with finite state expectations = exactly the Clay Yang-Mills existence object; full SM strictly harder (chiral gauge + Yukawa + Higgs). So nonperturbative (star) ⟹ Yang-Mills-existence-or-strictly-harder. PREMISE LOCK (2nd, certified): the whole chain thm:clausius-SM -> cor:E0-lin-SM -> (star) -> tensor is grade-locked at formal-pAQFT (thm:clausius-SM is formal-series, inversion's covariant conservation is an order-by-order Ward identity), so a nonperturbative (star) could not even be CONSUMED by cor:newtonian-limit without upgrading thm:clausius-SM (same wall). DFP TENSION RESOLVED (§II.3, one-state Delta_omega exists via Tomita-Takesaki / two-state Delta_{omega|Omega} fails per DFP -- same resolution the adjudicator reached from DFP l.420-434). FLOOR TABLE (obstruction side): R1 = best (reduction-to-B1a; CF uncitable for interacting SM as standalone per H3); R2 = empty-for-SM under the ledger's holographic-mechanism reading (no CHM scanning family for interacting massive SM, cor:E0-lin-SM l.19404-19406) but the FORMAL-pAQFT mechanism this run reduces via C1-C4; R3 = no-reduction/dead; R4 = inapplicable/dead; R5 = frame/spectral-reduction. PHYSICS FLOOR (bankable): V1 (EFT-truncated leading interacting order) is a genuine THEOREM (finite-order objects exist, immune to the wall) and SUFFICES for g_N=GM/R^2 (Earth at GM/Rc^2~7e-10, higher orders ~5e-19-suppressed, tex l.19588-19590).

### (2) WHAT (N1) REDUCES TO (the certified reduction — the FULL-VALUE outcome of this run)
(N1) at the responsible ceiling (all-orders-formal-pAQFT) ≡ **B1a**, a single named open problem:
  **B1a = construct the interacting relative-free-energy surrogate S-hat_rel for the SM pAQFT net (the DFP cocycle functional) on the local Rindler wedge, and PROVE its first-law property delta S-hat_rel = boost flux 2pi int x^1 delta<T00^SM> as a formal-series identity, UNIFORMLY over the weak-field region.**
Two layers (sharpened this run, past the ledger's single line l.4060):
  - (B1a-exist) the surrogate FUNCTIONAL exists as a formal series -- DFP PROVE this for the flat time-translation-KMS/thermal case (Def 2.1, Prop 2.2). OPEN for the boost-KMS / curved-wedge / SM-BV-BRST case (R2's H-T1). Note: this is NOT "no object exists" (R1's headline over-read the pessimism); it is "the object is constructed only in the thermal-flat arena; the transfer is unwritten".
  - (B1a-firstlaw) its first variation equals the geometric boost flux at n=1. GENUINELY OPEN, possibly NEGATIVE: no modular Hamiltonian generates the DFP functional, so the equality is exactly the interacting content never proven. If interacting corrections do not vanish at n=1 on non-Killing patches, B1a FAILS and (N1) is obstructed at formal-pAQFT too. R1's rigidity no-go shows the correction cannot be a geometric boost -> B1a is FORCED into the define-the-functional form on non-Killing patches.
Companion open items the routes also reduce (N1) to, none discharged: B2-nonKilling (the interacting curved small-patch RATE on generic non-Killing patches -- Killing closed at n=1 by Faulkner-Speranza eq 5.25; R5 reduces its COEFFICIENT to rho_2^int); interacting-E2a (the order-by-order ball-uniformity at one order-independent s0 -- reuses the free-E2a named-input family). B1a is the ATTACK-FIRST core (define-the-object precedes rate).

### (3) RECOMMENDATION — the best honest outcome this run, and the target worth a dedicated proof run
NOT a manufactured target. The full-value outcome delivered THIS run is the certified REDUCTION (N1) ≡ B1a (formal-pAQFT ceiling) + the certified nonperturbative OBSTRUCTION (Yang-Mills-or-harder). For a DEDICATED PROOF RUN, the honest ranked menu:
  1. **B1a as the named define-the-object problem (attack-first).** Construct the boost-KMS transfer of the DFP surrogate on the flat Rindler wedge (T1: does DFP's time-KMS cocycle U, generator K, strip integral survive alpha_t -> alpha_boost at beta=2pi by BW?) and prove delta S-hat_rel = boost flux at n=1 (H-B1b, interacting boost-Noether in pAQFT; n=0 is Longo/CLR EXACT, closed). In-print tooling: Fredenhagen-Rejzner relative entropy, Faldino, DFP cocycle. This is the SMALLEST, sharpest, most-tractable piece and it GATES everything. Single-companion-paper-sized. HONEST: its answer is not guaranteed positive (§(2) B1a-firstlaw).
  2. **V1 (EFT-truncated leading interacting order) as a standalone THEOREM.** Immune to the nonperturbative wall (finite-order objects exist), SUFFICIENT for the g_N=GM/R^2 deliverable. The CHEAPEST route to "classical recovery derived at leading interacting order". If the author wants a defensible "8.4->9+" move NOW without B1a, this is it.
  3. **B2-nonKilling coefficient via rho_2^int (R5's reduction).** Compute the interacting SM spin-2 Kallen-Lehmann low/mid-mu^2 moment and prove the RATE's uniformity over non-Killing patches. Formal-pAQFT, single-companion-sized. Depends on B1a for the first-law attachment.
DO-NOT (route fences, verified): attack via WEDGE/NULL route ONLY (DIAMOND route REFUTED, unbudgeted linear Theta((ml)log(ml)), ISSUES l.4049); do NOT chase B2 via CF-HSMI positivity (R3 closed it, three grounds); do NOT chase (N1) via Wall/null-quantization (R4 closed it by type); do NOT chase B1 via the "O2 exists for interacting" frame (F1 #24); keep SM in the CGM-safe window (weakly-coupled d=4, Higgs Delta>2); do NOT claim {C_n} bounded in n (nonperturbative-in-disguise, #24 home b); do NOT claim C_T pins the B2 coefficient (R5 sympy-refuted); do NOT import E2a-omega analyticity as if it helped (N1) (decoupled, l.19603-19611); do NOT write "the wedge first law's object (O2) exists for interacting theories" into paper prose (F1).

### (4) WHAT IT MEANS FOR THE PAPER (per-variant; research run, NO edits proposed -- author decides)
cor:newtonian-limit's conditionality (its scope-remark wording, rem:newtonian-limit-scope (b) l.19552-19583) HONESTLY BECOMES, per viable variant:
  - Under **V1 (EFT-truncated leading interacting order)** [a THEOREM now]: the leading-interacting-order truncation of (star) supplies the linearised tensor equation; g_N=GM/R^2 and Earth's 9.8 m/s^2 hold VERBATIM (the GR arithmetic is matter-agnostic, l.19516-19519; the higher-order tail is ~5e-19-suppressed AND mass-conserving by the shell theorem, so g_N=GM/R^2 untouched). The word "entails" (l.19502) survives; the scope remark would say classical recovery for planets is DERIVED at leading interacting order, with the all-orders and nonperturbative statements separately scoped. The "single conditional link" framing would narrow: the conditional link at LEADING order is closed; the all-orders link reduces to B1a. NO grade demotion.
  - Under **V2 / V-axiom (all-orders formal, or reduce to B1a-as-named-hypothesis)** [a REDUCTION now]: (N1) becomes "the all-orders-formal-pAQFT identity (star), unconditional as a formal power series at the grade of thm:clausius-SM, MODULO the single named companion problem B1a". The scope remark would name the smaller residual (B1a: the interacting relative-free-energy surrogate first-law) in place of the current opaque "linearised tensor completion for interacting massive SM matter".   - Under **V3 (nonperturbative SM d=4)**: INADMISSIBLE (H1 obstruction, R6; outruns thm:clausius-SM's own formal-series premise). The scope remark must NOT be worded to suggest a nonperturbative (star) is in reach.
The paper is ALREADY correctly scoped: the "(ml)^2 log(ml)" budget, CGP, Longo-coherent, and any (star)-via-CF claim appear NOWHERE in the tex (grep-confirmed across prior runs). LEDGER-ONLY holds; no paper edit is required or proposed this run.

### (5) #24 — HUNTED across all six routes + the inter-route seams; ONE found, fenced, never reached the paper. TWENTY-FOUR-run watch.
  - **HOME (a) [interacting citation beyond its proven hypotheses] = ONE FOUND (F1), FENCED.** n1_R1_proof.tex l.59 "the object Ceyhan-Faulkner and Hollands-Longo use; it EXISTS for interacting theories" cites CF/HL for the interacting-SM two-state relative modular operator as if it existed -- but that object is DFP-absent for the formal-series net.   - **HOME (b) [perturbative-as-nonperturbative] = CLEAN.** Every "nonperturbative"/"bounded in n"/"resummation" token in R2/R5/R6 is a NEGATION or explicit fence: R2 "treating the series as nonperturbative is [inadmissible]" + the two-register guard "uniform in n is FALSE-BY-DEFAULT and must NEVER be claimed" (n1_R2_uniformity.py l.17-18, 46); R5 "nonperturbative 4d construction [is what does not exist]"; R6 the certified obstruction. No unfenced perturbative-as-nonperturbative claim.
  - **HOME (c) [4d-existence elephant glossed behind an axiomatic hypothesis that secretly assumes the conclusion] = CLEAN AT THE RUN LEVEL, with the F1 seam being its only instance.** The V-axiom variant is fenced in the binding scope (n1_scope.md l.414-419: full-value "provided the hypothesis is NOT secretly the conclusion"). ### (1) ARM V1 (the bankable theorem) — CONFIRMED as a THEOREM, but at a LOWER GRADE than staged. RE-GRADE MANDATORY before any apply.
**What is CONFIRMED at full strength (both referees + this adjudicator):**
  - **The EFT truncation budget is EXHIBITED, not asserted (#25 home (a-budget) CLEAN).** v1_verify.py recomputes every number from measured inputs, **9/9 PASS** (re-run by me this run): eta_grav = GM_earth/R_earth c^2 = **6.961e-10 ~ 7e-10**; higher-order tail eta^2 = **4.846e-19 ~ 5e-19**; g_N = GM/R^2 = **9.82 m/s^2**; Lambda-seam accel = **2.100e-29 m/s^2**, a_Lambda/g_N = **2.138e-30 ~ 1e-30** (measured input). All four cross-check VERBATIM against the paper's own rem:newtonian-limit-scope(c) l.19585-19602 — V1 reproduces by SQUARING (7e-10)^2, invents no EFT bound. FS eq 5.25 O(eps^1) integrand = -sqrt(2) h (mu-z) exp(...)/(2 sqrt(pi) sigma^3), **integral over z = 0 EXACTLY** (symbolic, re-run); surviving O(eps^2) coeff = 1/(2 sigma^2) > 0.

Non-Killing n=1 residue weak-field-suppressed to O(eta_grav) (background departs from Killing by O(GM/rc^2)), explicitly NOT claimed as a B2-nonKilling solution (Part 4.2a fences this correctly).
  - **The shell-theorem null step does NOT smuggle an all-orders fact.** Part 4.3 uses only (i) ADM/Komar mass = conserved charge fixed to the MEASURED M (classical GR, which cor:newtonian-limit itself consumes l.19602) + (ii) Newton's shell theorem (l.19523 verbatim). int delta_rho_eff d^3x = 0: the higher-order tail redistributes but adds no net monopole. g_N = GM/R^2 is EXACTLY untouched at the relevant order, not merely 5e-19-perturbed. Direction-uniformity PROVEN OUTRIGHT (projector spectrum {0,0,1,1}, compact sphere, kinematic); point-uniformity honestly graded theorem-modulo-{M1,M2,M3}.
  - **All honesty fences held; diamond REFUTED (negation only, l.343); "derived" never unqualified (home (c) CLEAN, below).**

**THE SUBSTANTIVE #25 (home (a-seam)) — the scope police's GAP, independently CONFIRMED by this adjudicator:**
  - **KILLING FACT:** V1's n=1 interacting-MATTER leg silently consumes the interacting boost-Noether identity **(R-i)** at n=1 — the very object ARM 2b refutes-in-literal-form and ARM 2a/2c leave OPEN this same run — while billing V1 as a "categorical n<=1 theorem that asks strictly LESS and avoids needing B1a."
  - **THE TRACE (re-derived from the tex against the paper):** thm:clausius-SM eq:clausius-SM-flux (l.19316-19321) delivers ONLY `delta Q = T dK_omega + hbar A^even_grav + O(v^2/E_Pl^2)` with **K_omega = -log Delta_omega the ABSTRACT one-state modular Hamiltonian** (l.19283). It does NOT deliver `dK_omega = 2pi int x^1 d<T00>`. V1 eq:wedge-n1 (v1_theorem.tex l.260-267) correctly writes `delta Q^<=1 = T delta K_omega^<=1 + ...` (= thm:clausius-SM truncated, LEGITIMATE). But eq:chain-n1 (l.285-291) writes `delta S_rel^<=1 = 2pi int x^1 delta<T00^<=1> + ...`. The lambda^1 slice of that transition makes TWO silent substitutions: (i) `T delta K_omega^(1) -> 2pi int x^1 delta<T00^(1)>` (modular Hamiltonian = boost charge at n=1 = interacting BW) and (ii) `T delta K_omega^(1) -> delta S_rel^(1)` (the first-law linkage delta S_rel = delta<K> at n=1). BOTH are EXACT at n=0 (BW + Longo, free operator exists) but at n=1 are EXACTLY **(R-i)**, `w_{2pi}(K) = 2pi int x^1 <T00^int>` for R_V — the object b1a_firstlaw.tex proves FALSE in its literal delta-S form and b1a_exist/b1a_refute reduce to "n=0 exact/Longo, n>=1 OPEN, possibly negative." The localisation Part 2.1 (l.322-329, boost-normalised denominator 2pi int x^1 dSigma) REQUIRES the identification; the boxed eq:star-v1 (l.104-112) carries `delta<T^SM>^<=1` INCLUDING the n=1 term in its LOAD-BEARING RHS.
  - **THE ROOT CONFLATION (home (a)):** finite-order object EXISTENCE (T^<=1 is an honest Epstein-Glaser polynomial — TRUE, l.244-246) silently upgraded to the finite-order first-law IDENTITY (`dK_omega^(1) = 2pi int x^1 d<T00^(1)>` — OPEN = (R-i) at n=1). ### (2) ARM B1a (the all-orders core) — the exist / firstlaw / refuter race RESOLVED. B1a stays GENUINELY-OPEN, now sharpened on BOTH halves.
**B1a-exist (Arm 2a) — THEOREM modulo ONE named lemma (all-orders-formal-pAQFT), lambda^0 unconditional. CONFIRMED.**
  - The DFP relative-free-energy surrogate FUNCTIONAL transfers from time-KMS/thermal to Rindler-boost-KMS/Unruh at beta=2pi via Bisognano-Wichmann on the flat wedge W_R, as a formal power series. Not an analogy: a line-by-line frame-neutrality audit (Lemma 1) of DFP Def 2.1 + Prop 2.2 factors the WHOLE construction through three frame-neutral inputs — (P1) alpha is a one-param *-automorphism group preserving the region; (P2) omega is (alpha,beta)-KMS with strip domain; (P3) modular-strip analyticity of connected correlators makes the DFP simplex integrals (eqs 44,47) converge order by order. DFP's proof uses "time" ONLY as a LABEL (l.1146 "time translation" names the KMS analyticity BW supplies for the boost); even the positivity endgame (DFP eqs 23-24, l.1129-1171) uses the KMS spectral density subsumed under (P2). For the boost: (P1),(P2) are BW theorems (boost = complete future-directed timelike Killing flow inside W_R, xi.xi=-(x1^2-x0^2)<0; FL14 cocycle U^boost + generator K^boost exist as formal series; BW makes omega_vac (alpha_boost,2pi)-KMS — ONE-state modular flow, licensed).

This is the boost transcription of an IN-PRINT time-KMS fact (Fredenhagen-Lindner FL14 / Lindner Li13 Sec 4.4). PLAUSIBLE: all u-analyticity is carried by the FREE wedge two-point function (Claim 1), which HAS the 2pi-strip domain (Lemma 2 = THEOREM: BW modular / Bros-Buchholz / explicit Unruh 2pi-periodicity); interacting kernels enter as fixed test data. Two genuinely-new features vs time-KMS: (a) interacting retarded-kernel UV singularities inside the strip integral; (b) edge-pinching of boost orbits (REMOVED by localising supp V away from the edge). Neither involves an operator. NOT proved here; single named companion lemma.
  - **#25 home (b) UNTOUCHED (fence F-op verified):** every object is C[[lambda]]-valued (cocycle U^boost, generator K^boost, functional S-hat^boost_rel = omega_vac(2pi K) + log omega_vac(U(2pi i))). No Hilbert space, no GNS, no Delta^{it}, no relative modular operator — the DFP two-state operator (l.433-434) stays absent (grep-verified: b1a_exist.tex l.83-84,130-149,685-691 all fence/negation). SCOPE boundaries flagged: SCALAR (SM BV-BRST re-read of (P1)-(P3) expected to transfer, not done); FLAT (curvature/B2-nonKilling untouched).

**B1a-firstlaw (Arm 2b) — NEGATIVE-RESULT on the literal claim + the EXACT REDUCTION. CONFIRMED (independently re-derived).**
  - The literal `delta S-hat_rel = 2pi int x^1 delta<T00^SM>` at n=1 on the flat Rindler wedge is **FALSE**, obstruction STRUCTURAL and NAMED: **DFP QUADRATICITY** (Prop 2.2(a) + eq 25). The surrogate `S(w_b,w_{b,V}) = (beta^2/2)(K|K)_beta + O(K^3)` is a relative FREE ENERGY = Bregman/relative-entropy DIVERGENCE, hence STATIONARY at the reference boost-KMS state: its FIRST variation vanishes IDENTICALLY (O(eps^2)), while the boost flux has generically NONZERO first variation (O(eps^1)). Order mismatch O(eps^2) vs O(eps^1) => literal equality FALSE. **This RESOLVES the run-18 "possibly NEGATIVE" flag (l.4723 / prior "answer possibly-negative"): the "possibly" COLLAPSES to a DEFINITE negative** with the obstruction named. It is the shadow, in the surviving functional, of the ABSENT two-state relative modular operator: the object with nonzero first variation (FLPW `<K_omega>_psi` with K_omega a FIXED reference modular Hamiltonian) does NOT exist for the interacting net; the object that survives (DFP S, energy bK=R_V(Vdot) MOVES with V) has first variation zero.

Reproduces DFP Prop 2.2(a) from scratch. The component identity FL-1 `delta<bK> = beta deltaF` is the surviving n=1 content, = (R-i). #25 home (b) actively fenced in b1a_firstlaw.tex (Rem 3.4; l.305-309 flags importing a fixed K_omega/Delta^{it} to force a nonzero first variation AS the home-(b) error).

**B1a-firstlaw REFUTER (Arm 2c) — NEGATIVE-RESULT for the REFUTATION (B1a-firstlaw survives every candidate attack), with ONE mechanism-level GAP against it. CONFIRMED + GAP-FOUND.**

The nonzero object that equals the flux is the SECOND variation / the quadratic FORM: the Longo identity is `S[amp] = flux[amp]` between two O(eps^2) quadratic forms (verified: S_longo = flux at EVERY eps to 12 digits, e.g. both = 4.38938294e+01 at eps=1), NOT a nonzero-first-variation first law. **THE RACE RESOLUTION (prover 2b NEGATIVE vs refuter 2c not-refuted — they cannot both be right; the error found):**

### (0) THE PRIZE, EXACTLY (from ri_scope.md, BINDING — 481 lines, pinned before anyone proved)
(R-i) = the scheme-matched interacting boost-Noether identity:
  **w_{2π}(K) = 2π ∫_H x^1 ⟨T00^int⟩,  order by order in λ,  K = R_V(V̇^boost),**
on the flat right Rindler wedge W_R, under the Bogoliubov map R_V, in a FIXED common EG/Hollands-Wald scheme R*. LHS w_{2π}(K) := ω_vac(2πK), ω_vac the wedge-vacuum (BW makes it (α^boost,2π)-KMS), K the DFP cocycle GENERATOR (C[[λ]]-valued number, NOT an operator — the ⟨βK⟩ internal-energy leg, NOT the surrogate S_rel whose first variation is 0). RHS = DPR/Fröb-Zahn renormalized interacting T00 (Hadamard parametrix), boost-weighted over H. n=0 EXACT (Longo/CLR + BW); n≥1 OPEN with NO KNOWN LOCAL OBSTRUCTION. STRICTLY WEAKER than (star). It is the SINGLE SURVIVING CORE of B1a-firstlaw: the naive δS_rel=flux is run-19-NEGATIVE (DFP quadraticity — Bregman divergence, first variation ≡0); FL-1 (δ⟨βK⟩=βδF) + R-ii collapse the first-law leg to (R-i) alone (b1a_firstlaw red:main l.367-403, verified verbatim).

### (1) (R-i) AT n=1 — REDUCED to the obstructing term 𝔒^(1), reproduced INDEPENDENTLY from scratch
The decisive ledger (P1's eq:mainledger; adj20_ri_independent.py Parts A-B, 9/9 PASS, imports nothing):
  **w_{2π}(K)^(1) − 2π∫_H x^1⟨T00^int⟩^(1) = −𝔒^(1) − 2π c1 ∫_H x^1(∂0²−□/4)⟨:φ²:⟩^(1),**
with a SINGLE surviving obstructing term
  **𝔒^(1) := ⟨K_W^(0)⟩_{ω_vac,V}^(1) = −2π (K_W^(0)|K)_{2π} = −β·Cov_KM(K_W^(0),K),**
the CONNECTED TWO-POINT KUBO-MORI / DUHAMEL SELF-RESPONSE of the free boost charge K_W^(0)=2π∫_H x^1 T00^(0) to the interaction generator K. KILLING FACTS (my independent re-derivation, all PASS):
  - **𝔒^(1) reproduced two independent ways**: finite-difference d/dλ⟨K_W⟩_{ω_V}|_0 vs closed-form Kubo-Mori (diagonal-A: 𝔒^(1)=Σ_a(βw_a)dp_a/dλ, since K_W=βH is diagonal in the modular basis) — agree to 1e-10 (Cov_KM = −0.6425 in the model). It IS the entropy variation (1/β)δS_vN, tightening the Longo n=0 tie.
  - **TREE/one-point (R-i) holds EXACTLY** (b1a_refute_noether.py re-run: 2π·x^1·T00^int = 2π·K_density = πg·x^1·φ³/3, difference 0). Møller=id at O(λ). 𝔒^(1) is the genuinely QUANTUM (ħ, connected-2pt, loop-order) piece — NOT the tree charge.
  - **Carried ENTIRELY by the boost-INVARIANT ZERO MODE of K** (diagonal part = full 𝔒^(1); off-diagonal = 6e-10); **𝔒^(1)=0 iff K = i[K_W,X]** (pure boost-variation, Ward-trivial direction; O_pure=1.7e-10).
  - **NOT absorbable by a universal counterterm c1**: c1 spread across interactions = 29.6 (my run) / 3.45 (P1) — interaction-DEPENDENT, so no interaction-independent c1 repairs the identity (this REFUTED P1's own first-draft "THEOREM under C-align" and is the fence against #27 home-(a)). **State-dependent**: 𝔒^(1)(β=2π)/𝔒^(1)(β=π)=0.224 — a fixed local c-number would not rescale, so 𝔒^(1) is a NONLOCAL state-response, not a local anomaly.
THE EXACT OPEN STEP: **(R-i) at n=1 ⟺ 𝔒^(1)=0 ⟺ the first-order INTERACTING BOOST WARD IDENTITY.** NOT proven (no assembly of BF/Rejzner interacting-Noether current + Hollands-Wald order-by-order conservation into a vanishing proof) and NOT refuted (no LOCAL obstruction; finite models decide STRUCTURE only, not the renormalized value). VERDICT: **NEGATIVE-RESULT (obstructing term BY NAME) + full-value SHARPENING** — (R-i) at n=1 is sharpened from "prove the λ^1 slice" to "prove 𝔒^(1)=0", a single named writable computation. Calibration met: n=0 Longo ratio 1.000000000000, both sides O(ε²) quadratic forms, first variation 0 (category-slip fence honoured).

### (2) (R-i) ALL-ORDERS — what P2's structural route + anomaly classification honestly gives
P2 (ri_allorders.tex, PLAUSIBLE) supplied the genuine STRUCTURAL framing: the BDFR *unitary Master Ward Identity* (arXiv:2108.13336, AHP 2023; abstract WebFetch-verified verbatim "yields directly the unitaries implementing the symmetries... unravels... the role of anomalies") gives, from the single fact that S(V) is boost-covariant, the operator identity 2πK = Q^b_int + 2π𝔞^b order by order, 𝔞^b the MWI anomaly LOCAL at each order. So (R-i) ⟺ ω_vac(𝔞^b)=0 per order, a CONJUNCTION of independent per-order Ward identities with **NO n-uniform bound carried between orders** (home-(c) CLEAN — the structural payoff of a Noether identity over a first-law estimate; {C_n}-boundedness neither claimed nor used). ANOMALY CLASSIFIED (3 parts): (a) parity-ODD (Lorentz/Pontryagin) = 0 by SM1+SM2; (b) parity-EVEN trace = state-independent local c-number, k²=0-killed on the null cut AND already booked on the gravity side of thm:clausius-SM (no double-count); (c) finite-renorm mismatch = the only obstructing part = #27 home-(a). CDG (arXiv:2411.07109; WebFetch-verified: divergence-free interacting T00 via Moretti η=1/3 "at least up to O(λ³)", explicitly NOT all orders) makes T00^int conserved to low order.

### (0) THE OBJECT (from ri_scope.md / run-20, BINDING)
𝔒^(1) := ⟨K_W^(0)⟩_{ω_V}^(1) = −β·Cov_KM(K_W^(0), K), β=2π, K_W^(0)=2π∫_H x^1 T00^(0) = β·H_mod (Bisognano–Wichmann, the wedge modular Hamiltonian), K = R_V(V̇^boost) = (g/4!)∫x^1 :φ⁴: the DFP cocycle boost generator. (R-i) at order n ⟺ 𝔒^(n)=0. Run-20 reduced (R-i) to 𝔒^(n)=0 (n=0 EXACT; n≥1 open-no-obstruction-no-proof, one named quantity). Run-21 commission: DECIDE 𝔒^(1) — prove zero / compute nonzero / reduce — reproducing the zero-mode treatment.

### (1) 𝔒^(1): **PROVED ZERO** at n=1 for λφ⁴ (scalar, massive, wedge-KMS). (R-i) at n=1 = THEOREM.
Referee-confirmed BOTH referees CONFIRMED high-confidence; this adjudicator reproduced the decisive computation independently (adjF_singlemode.py, adjF_confront.py, adjF_zeromode.py, adjF_multimode_seam.py, adjF_n2.py, adjF_VERDICT.py 5/5).
THE MECHANISM (thermal-Wick / KMS Bose orthogonality), reproduced symbolically + numerically:
  - The physical thermal-Wick diagonal is **⟨n|:φ⁴:_th|n⟩ = A d² + B d + C, d:=n−n̄, A=6, B=−(12n̄+6)** (explicit Wick subtraction of the KMS contraction c=2n̄+1; symbolic, exact).
  - K_W^(0)=βH is **LINEAR in n** (it IS the modular generator, BW), so its connected Kubo–Mori covariance sees only A⟨d³⟩+B⟨d²⟩.
  - Exact Bose central moments **⟨d²⟩=n̄(1+n̄), ⟨d³⟩=n̄(1+n̄)(1+2n̄)** ⟹ ⟨d³⟩/⟨d²⟩=1+2n̄ = **−B/A**. So **A⟨d³⟩+B⟨d²⟩=0 IDENTICALLY, every n̄, every boost frequency w.**
  - **Kubo–Mori = ordinary connected covariance** for K_W=βH (diagonal collapse: e^{sβH}K_W e^{−sβH}=K_W, no Duhamel spreading), verified to 3.5e−18 for a GENERIC (non-diagonal) Y ⟹ only the DIAGONAL of :φ⁴: enters, off-diagonal/cross-mode CANNOT leak.
  - Multi-mode cross-coupled :φ⁴: → 𝔒^(1)=0 as the Fock cutoff converges (N=5:2.9e−5 → N=11:−1.7e−16 → N=14:−1.7e−16).

### (2) THE DECIDING FORK — Route A's error, reproduced BIT-EXACTLY (#28 home-b)
Route A (ward_noether.py) and L1 (ward_L1) claimed 𝔒^(1)≠0 REAL, Cov_KM=−0.6425 "not a compactness artifact." **The error is ward_noether.py line 45: `K=herm(rng,d)` — a GENERIC random Hermitian matrix (bit-identical to run-20 ri_n1.py l.82) — used in place of the physical thermal-Wick :φ⁴:.** This adjudicator (adjF_confront.py, adjF_VERDICT.py CHECK 2):
  - **Reproduced Cov_KM = −0.642540 EXACTLY** with the generic K (seed 2026, d=7, the wrong operator).
  - In the SAME modular Gibbs machinery, the **physical thermal-Wick :φ⁴: gives 𝔒^(1) = −2.9e−10** (zero).
  - A **NON-modular charge βH² with the SAME physical :φ⁴: gives −0.0105 (nonzero)** ⟹ the vanishing is NOT genericity of :φ⁴:; it REQUIRES K_W linear-in-n (BW modular). Mechanism confirmed specific.
Route A's OTHER claimed evidence — the sum rule 𝔒^(1)=β²d/dβ⟨hL_I⟩ — is a CORRECT identity but Route A evaluated it with VACUUM ordering, which is the pure :φ²: MASS channel (see (4)), not the connected quartic. Route A's "surviving boost-invariant zero mode ⟹ 𝔒^(1)≠0" inference is the fallacy: the zero mode survives as a nonzero OPERATOR (true) but its KM pairing with K_W vanishes (per-w=0 at every w).

### (3) THE ZERO-MODE TREATMENT — EXHIBITED at 50 dps (the task's explicit crux, #28 home-b)
Reproduced independently (adjF_zeromode.py, adjF_VERDICT.py CHECK 3), THREE facts:
  - **(I) INTEGRAND-LEVEL VANISHING**: the per-w KM kernel A⟨d³⟩_w+B⟨d²⟩_w = 0 IDENTICALLY at every boost frequency w, verified to 40+ digits including **w=1e−8** (the zero mode). Hence I(w)=w·χ(w)·[kernel]=0 for all w; there is NO ATOM, and the density-of-states bookkeeping is MOOT (0×anything=0). Cleanest possible resolution.
  - **(II) ROUTE A's DROPPED COUNTERTERM**: ward_wick.py/ward_counting.py kept only the tadpole w·A⟨d³⟩ → +12/(β³w²) and DROPPED the normal-ordering counterterm w·B⟨d²⟩ → −12/(β³w²); the coefficient is 12.0 (verified to 11.9999…=12), and WITH the counterterm they cancel identically INCLUDING at w→0. Each piece is finite/regular, not a compactness eigenvalue.
  - **(III) ABSOLUTELY-CONTINUOUS SPECTRUM**: the boost flow on the wedge is type III_1 (Takesaki-ergodic), purely a.c.; the Kontorovich–Lebedev measure ρ_KL(w)=(2/π²)w·sinh(πw) ~ (2/π)w² → 0, so **w=0 is measure-ZERO**. The finite models had a genuine w=0 EIGENSPACE by compactness; the continuum does NOT. So even the surviving-zero-mode operator has measure-zero support — the atom contributes 0 twice over.
THE CRUX IS DECIDED: the finite-model Cov_KM=−0.6425 was WRONG-OPERATOR (generic K), NOT a compactness artifact of the zero mode. 𝔒^(1)=0 holds AT the zero mode and everywhere.

### (4) THE S-3 SCHEME SEAM (#27 home-a) — RESOLVED, DEMONSTRATED not asserted
Reproduced independently (adjF_multimode_seam.py part C): vacuum-ordered minus thermal-ordered :φ⁴: = **a PURE :φ²: MASS term** (‖(:φ⁴:_vac−:φ⁴:_th) − [6δ:φ²:+const]‖=9e−13). Consequently the VACUUM-ordered 𝔒^(1)=−0.013 is **ENTIRELY the mass channel** (mass-channel-only = −0.013, identical); vacuum minus mass-channel = −6.9e−17 = thermal-ordered = **0**. The mass channel is the run-20 ledger's separately-booked c1 stress-improvement (n=0-BW-exact, LEDGER-CANCELLED), NOT the connected quartic. 𝔒^(1) is DEFINED as the connected quartic piece = 0, regardless of ordering. This reproduces run-20's φ⁴-avatar nonzero (ri_n1_rindler) as the c1 channel — Route A/run-20's imperfect Wick left this mass term in, inflating the value.

### (1) THE SM LIFT at n=1 — PER-SECTOR TABLE (adjudicator-reproduced: adj22_sm_crux.py)

  - **GAUGE QUARTIC (g²A⁴)**: **THEOREM(scalar-avatar)**. Same occupation structure as :φ⁴:; diagonal-cov 𝔒^(1)=−1.8e−16 (N=24) by the identical Bose ratio.
  - **GAUGE CUBIC (g f A²∂A)**: **THEOREM**. Odd ladder power ⟹ max|diag(A³)|=0 EXACTLY (N=20,24) ⟹ 𝔒^(1)=0 identically.
  - **FERMI-DIRAC MOMENT RATIO ⟨d³⟩/⟨d²⟩=1−2f**: **THEOREM** — the #29-home-(a) target, COMPUTED (not asserted from Bose) THREE independent ways (brute 2-level Pauli enumeration; cumulant GF log(1−f+f e^t); direct central moments), numeric to 30 dps. SIGN FLIP vs Bose 1+2n̄ is REAL. **But NON-LOAD-BEARING at n=1**: PAULI idempotency n²=n (verified |N²−N|=0) forbids any single-fermion-mode d², so a fermion CANNOT form the scalar's A d²+B d structure the ratio governs; the quadratic that must cancel is carried by BOSONS. The Yukawa vertex g φ(ψ̄ψ) is fermion-bilinear × scalar-linear (linear in each) — no single quartic field power at n=1; the ratio would gate only a genuine fermionic QUARTIC (the |g|² 1-loop channel), flagged as the sibling crux, not assumed.

Ghost enters T00 bilinearly (∂c̄)(∂c) ⟹ diagonal :c̄c:_th LINEAR in d (like :φ²:) ⟹ raw 𝔒^(1)_ghost=βw f(1−f)≠0 (reproduced: 0.1247, 0.0117, 0.0008 at w=0.5,1,1.5 = analytic exactly). The Fermi ratio is IRRELEVANT for a LINEAR operator. So NO 'BRST-exact ⟹ 0' shortcut is available (the #29-home-(b) trap) — the OPPOSITE is proved.

The reduction — order-by-order [Q_int,K_W_int]=0 AND T00_int reduces to transverse in the dressed KMS state on H_phys — is NOT the in-print gauge-current conservation. **MINIMUM rule: no sector claims theorem while gauge is reduced.**

### (5) THE ARITHMETIC ERROR CAUGHT (ARM 2a exhibited mechanism) — #29-home-(c)-ADJACENT, NOT a verdict flip
The referee flagged, and I INDEPENDENTLY GROUND-TRUTHED THREE ways (adj22_kap3_independent.py: correct Poly.terms() collapse; hand-expanded central moments; brute Fock-sum 40 dps), that **o2_verify.py's PUBLISHED diagonal kernel is arithmetically WRONG**:
  - o2_verify.py (l.254,260,401; gate G4) claims kappa3 = E[d·Kc²] = **144·n̄·(1+n̄)²·(11n̄²−8n̄+3)** — WRONG. Root cause: `term.as_coeff_Mul()` (l.250) pulls only the pure number into the coeff and leaves the n̄-powers inside `monom`, so `c·mu[deg]` DROPS the n̄-powers attached to d^k. I reproduced the bug: the buggy routine yields exactly the published 144(...) polynomial.
  - **CORRECT kernel = 288·n̄²·(n̄+1)²·(2n̄+1)** (all three of my methods agree; brute Fock-sum 324/3456/51840 at n̄=0.5/1/2 matches ONLY this). The two agree ONLY at n̄=1 (both 3456), which is why the Om=1 gate (n̄≈0.0019) missed it. The "11n̄²−8n̄+3, discriminant −68" positive-definiteness argument is **VOID**.
  - **Gate G4 is a FALSE POSITIVE**: it asserts positivity of the WRONG polynomial (which happens to also be positive), so it "passed" while certifying a wrong expression — the exact #29-home-(c) mechanism one order up, caught in-run.
  - **BUT the verdict is UNAFFECTED**: (i) the CORRECT kernel is a product of manifestly positive factors ⟹ STILL STRICTLY POSITIVE for all n̄>0 (sign-definite conclusion survives with a cleaner proof, no discriminant); (ii) o2_verify.py's own NUMERIC diagonal 𝔒^(2)[diag]=0.12597 matches the CORRECT kernel not the wrong one (the machinery was right; only the exhibited symbolic polynomial was wrong); (iii) 𝔒^(2) is OFF-DIAGONAL dominated (43.93 of 44.05), so the diagonal kernel does not set the magnitude anyway.
  - **NUANCE (adjudicator, beyond the referee)**: the companion **sm_fermi.py (l.491) kernel is CORRECT** — it uses `sp.Poly(poly,d).all_coeffs()` (the right routine) and computes the CONNECTED cumulant ⟨d(dV)²⟩−⟨d⟩⟨(dV)²⟩−2⟨d·dV⟩⟨dV⟩ = 144·n̄²·(n̄+1)²·(2n̄+1) = (correct E[d·Kc²])/2 (connected normalization), positive. So the defect is CONFINED to o2_verify.py's symbolic display; the ARM-1 kernel is sound. **This is the 29th caught overclaim-class defect, caught INSIDE the run (referee + this adjudicator's 3-way ground-truth), never reaching the paper.**

### (0) THE OBJECTS (inherited BINDING, run-20/21/22)

### (1) ARM A — THE BRST LEMMA, per-piece (adjudicator reproduced from scratch: adj23_final_indep2.py, my [cbar|c|L|B] order)
  - **(i) [Q_int,K_W^int]=0 at n=1**: **REDUCED-TO-ONE-GATE** (not a theorem, not refuted). The FREE anchor [Q,K_W]=0 holds ONLY at quartet modular-degeneracy ω_g=ω_b (the Kugo-Ojima "boost is a symmetry" input, realized at KMS: ‖[Q,K_W]‖=2.8e-14 vs de-tuned control 1.64). The candidate horizon obstruction (the modular weight x^1 is NOT BRST-inert; boost of the switched interaction has a horizon boundary term on the non-compact wedge) is NOT decidable in a finite model: the descent [Q^(1),K_W]=−[Q,K^(1)] shows 74% outside im ad_{K_W}, but ONLY because K^(1) is an arbitrary operator not the constrained boost cocycle, and any solvable Q^(1) must be LOCAL — invisible to any finite algebra. The refuter FAILED to exhibit a boost-BRST anomaly (evidence AGAINST at the resolvable level) but the single deciding gate — IR/locality of the descent solution on the non-compact Rindler horizon — needs the genuine pAQFT construction (Dütsch anomaly-consistency for the boost STRESS current + BDFR dynamical-symmetry-in-BV, checked for a LOCAL descent on the wedge). NOT done, NOT doable finitely.
  - **(ii) THE THERMAL QUARTET CANCELLATION**: **THEOREM within the finite quartet-KMS model**, reproduced to machine precision (arm: STr(e^{-βH}{Q,X})=0 to 7.84e-18; my independent [cbar|c|L|B] build: <T00_unphys>_phys=−9.7e-11, Z_phys=1.00000000). THE DECISIVE CANCELLATION (3-line proof + numeric): [Q,H]=0 and Q FP-odd ⟹ STr(e^{-βH}{Q,X})=STr(e^{-βH}·(-1)^F-odd)=0 for ALL X; both inputs are finite-T facts (the Gibbs weight commutes with Q), so it is the genuine ARAKI-KMS TRANSPLANT of Kugo-Ojima, NOT the vacuum argument. THE EXACT KREIN IDENTITY (the #30-home-(a) resolution, reproduced by me to 1e-6 at w=0.5, by the arm to machine zero at w=0.30/0.50/1.00/1.70): <N_ghost>_STr = −n_bose(w) EXACTLY — the indefinite (Krein/FP) metric maps the fermionic ghost onto MINUS the Bose occupation, so longitudinal+scalar (+2 n_bose) cancel ghost+antighost (−2 n_bose) IDENTICALLY. This is the PRECISE resolution of run-22's G3 "Bose Var ≠ Fermi Var": the individual occupations are SEPARATELY NONZERO (my <N_L>=<N_B>=+0.045166, <N_c>=<N_cbar>=−0.045166) and cancel BY THE METRIC, not by a moment match — the naive quartet-energy moment sum 2w(nbar−f) is NONZERO at KMS (my value +3.7419e-3), confirming it is NOT a moment identity. Z_phys=STr(e^{-βH_q})=1 exactly (unique physical state = vacuum; excited quartet levels cancel in (-1)^F pairs of equal energy) ⟹ genuine cohomology, not coincidental zero. DRESSING SURVIVAL (my build): BRST-closed K ⟹ <T00_unphys>_dressed=−7.9e-12=0 to all λ; generic (non-closed) K ⟹ −0.1667 ≠ 0 (the #28 wrong-operator discipline, both ways).

My independent Block B reproduced the SCALAR mechanism's companion (O^(1)~0, S_rel^(1)~0, the first-law identity).
